name: Sub Pedal
explanation: A dedicated deep sub-bass pedal synthesizer in the lineage of the classic wooden foot-pedal bass synths. HUGE and simple by design: two stacked main oscillators (saw + square) tuned low, plus a thick square SUB an octave below for chest-thumping weight, all driven through a fat 4-pole Moog-style transistor-ladder low-pass with tanh saturation in the feedback loop and a deliberately slow filter envelope. Monophonic with last-note-priority glide/portamento and a punchy amplitude envelope, finished by a warm overdrive stage that adds low-end weight and harmonics. Built for floor-rumbling root notes. Controls: Cutoff, Resonance, Sub, Glide, Decay, Drive and Level.
